'''Dontamo''' was a planet in the [[Radiant One system]], near [[Alba-16]]. It was a jungle world in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and it was where [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Clive Flax]] were held in captivity at [[Dontamo Prison]] for crimes against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The prisoners were compelled to work in a factory building parts of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' {{Mo}}
